pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play, strike two
Curveball misses low and outside, ball one
Slider down and in, ball two
Hammered to left field, drops in and rolls to the wall, stand-up double

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 0-2, 1-2, 2-2, then double. Slauson is 0-for-2 coming in. Leadoff double to left field, ball rolls to the wall. Runner on second, nobody out.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and into the stands, strike one
Grounded to first, Castor unassisted, Slauson advances to third

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 1-1, then groundout. Palomar is 1-for-2 with a hit in the first. Castor steps on the bag unassisted. Slauson advances to third. One out, runner on third.

pitchSequence.description: Fly ball to center field, Moon makes the catch, Slauson tags and scores

notes: First-pitch sac fly. Patterson is 1-for-2. Moon catches the fly ball, Slauson tags and scores from third. Cars take the lead 2-1. Infield was in for Patterson. Two outs, bases empty.

pitchSequence.description: Rounder to second, Ferguson flips to first

notes: Count progression: 1-0, then groundout. Nakamura is 1-for-2. Ferguson fields and flips to first to retire Nakamura. End of the top of the fifth. Cars lead 2-1 after four and a half.

pitchSequence.description: Grounded to second, Cortez flips to first

notes: First-pitch groundout. Ferguson grounded out in the second. Cortez with the routine play, flips to first for out number one.

pitchSequence.description: Off-speed pitch, cut on and missed, strike one
Swing and a miss on a low curve, strike two
Fastball down and in, ball one
Swing and a miss on a low curve, strike three

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 0-2, 1-2, then strikeout. Rudderson had a base hit in the third. Goes down on strikes for out number two.

pitchSequence.description: Wild hack at an outside breaking ball, strike two
Swing and a miss, strike three

notes: Count progression: 0-1, 0-2, then strikeout. Hughes sets them down in order. Three up, three down for the Timbers in the bottom of the fifth. Score: Cars 2, Timbers 1 after five.
